item.title: Angular Enterprise Dashboard - Phase 3A.1: Pre-Fetching Data with Functional Resolvers
item.description: Welcome to Phase 3A — where our dashboard stops being a static shell and starts becoming intelligent. In Phase 2 we secured the routes and built the layout. Now we need to fill it with data.
